# BreakBPM

> BreakBPM is a free, browser-based billiards score tracker that calculates per-player Balls Per Minute (BPM) for 8-ball, 9-ball, practice, and solo Shark mode. No install required.

BreakBPM logs every shot one ball at a time and returns two numbers: accuracy and BPM. It supports live multiplayer scoring via a 5-character share code, spectating by player name, and optional pass-gated features such as full game history, tiered stats, a global leaderboard, and @mention linking. Passes are redeemed by code; card checkout is optional and may be unavailable.

Built and operated by Saym Services Inc. in Vancouver, Canada.

## Key pages

- Home: https://breakbpm.com/
- About: https://breakbpm.com/about
- Legal: https://breakbpm.com/legal
